ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kareadita/Kavita
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kareadita/Kavita
Language: c%23
Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MiniMax-AI/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/skills
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PCL-Community/PCL-CE
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PCL-Community/PCL-CE
Language: c%23
PCL 社区版 由社区开发者维护与管理

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SubtitleEdit/subtitleedit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SubtitleEdit/subtitleedit
Language: c%23
the subtitle editor :)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tyrrrz/DiscordChatExporter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tyrrrz/DiscordChatExporter
Language: c%23
Saves Discord chat logs to a file

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/Open-XML-SDK
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/Open-XML-SDK
Language: c%23
Open XML SDK by Microsoft

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet
Language: c%23
Home of .NET's Virtual Monolithic Repository which includes all the code needed to build the .NET SDK.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/msbuild
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/msbuild
Language: c%23
The Microsoft Build Engine (MSBuild) is the build platform for .NET and Visual Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fullstackhero/dotnet-starter-kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fullstackhero/dotnet-starter-kit
Language: c%23
Production Grade Cloud-Ready .NET 10 Starter Kit (Web API + React Client) with Multitenancy Support, and Clean/Modular Architecture that saves roughly 200+ Development Hours! All Batteries Included.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
Language: c%23
A hex editor for WeChat/QQ/TIM - PC版微信/QQ/TIM防撤回补丁（我已经看到了，撤回也没用了）

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23
.NET Decompiler with support for PDB generation, ReadyToRun, Metadata (&more) - cross-platform!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template for ASP.NET Core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/garnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/garnet
Language: c%23
Garnet is a remote cache-store from Microsoft Research that offers strong performance (throughput and latency), scalability, storage, recovery, cluster sharding, key migration, and replication features. Garnet can work with existing Redis clients.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mono/SkiaSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp
Language: c%23
SkiaSharp is a cross-platform 2D graphics API for .NET platforms based on Google's Skia Graphics Library. It provides a comprehensive 2D API that can be used across mobile, server and desktop models to render images.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: velopack/velopack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/velopack/velopack
Language: c%23
Installer and automatic update framework for cross-platform desktop applications
